content: Discovery documents created: Lane A (custody): 25 interrogatories, 25 RFP categories, 30 RFAs (MCR 2.312 deemed-admitted weapon). Lane B (housing): 25 interrogatories to 8 defendants, 32 RFP categories. Pending: subpoenas duces tecum (MC 326), Rule 30(b)(6) deposition notices, FRCP 26(a)(1) federal initial disclosures.
